# 🚨 Hotfix Description
Briefly describe the critical bug, its impact, and why it requires an immediate fix.

# 🔍 Root Cause
What caused the issue to occur in the first place?

# 🩹 Immediate Fix
How does this PR resolve the issue?

## ✅ Definition of Done
_By opening this Hotfix PR, I confirm:_
- [ ] The fix addresses the immediate issue without introducing obvious regressions.
- [ ] I have verified the fix locally or via the emergency CI pipeline.
- [ ] (Optional) I have created a follow-up issue to address any technical debt or missing tests introduced by this rapid hotfix.

# 🔗 Related Issue (Optional)
If an issue *was* created for this bug before the hotfix, link it here.
Otherwise, leave blank.

Closes #
